prompt: Show students count by department and current semester

inputData.question: Show students count by department and current semester

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show students count by department and current semester"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show students count by department and current semester"},"startedAt":1771856115784,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for students count by department and current semester. The students table has both department_id (foreign key to departments) and current_semester columns. I need to join students with departments and group by both department name and current_semester to get the count of students in each combination.","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department,
  s.current_semester AS semester,
  COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM students s
INNER JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name, s.current_semester
","assumptions":["The 'current_semester' column in the students table represents the current semester for each student","A student belongs to exactly one department via the department_id foreign key"]},"endedAt":1771856135956},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

data.department: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Students Count by Department and Current Semester

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department,
  s.current_semester AS semester,
  COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM students s
INNER JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name, s.current_semester

visualization.title: Students Count by Department and Current Semester

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department,
  s.current_semester AS semester,
  COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM students s
INNER JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.name, s.current_semester
ORDER BY d.name, s.current_semester
